Arkansas Plumbing Pros

Plumber in Arkansas | Same Day Service

Your trusted local plumbers in Arkansas. Same day service for drain cleaning, water heater repair, pipe repair, toilet & faucet installation, sewer line repair, leak detection & emergency plumbing — available across all 621 cities in AR.

(877) 710-2942

Licensed Plumbers
500,000+
Jobs Completed
75,000+

Professional Plumbing Services in Arkansas

Emergency Plumber in Arkansas

Looking for emergency plumber in Arkansas? Contact Plumbing Local Pros at (877) 710-2942 for professional plumbing services. Plumbing emergency? Our rapid-response plumbers are available 24/7 to handle burst pipes, major leaks, no hot water, and any urgent plumbing crisis at your home or business.

Get Quotes

Drain Cleaning in Arkansas

Looking for drain cleaning in Arkansas? Contact Plumbing Local Pros at (877) 710-2942 for professional plumbing services. Clogged or slow-running drains? We use professional hydro-jetting and drain snake equipment to clear kitchen sinks, bathroom drains, floor drains, and main sewer lines near you.

Get Quotes

Water Heater Repair & Installation in Arkansas

Looking for water heater repair & installation in Arkansas? Contact Plumbing Local Pros at (877) 710-2942 for professional plumbing services. No hot water? Our licensed plumbers repair all brands of water heaters and install new traditional tank or tankless water heaters quickly and professionally near you.

Get Quotes

Pipe Repair & Replacement in Arkansas

Looking for pipe repair & replacement in Arkansas? Contact Plumbing Local Pros at (877) 710-2942 for professional plumbing services. Leaking, cracked, or corroded pipes can cause major water damage.

Get Quotes

Toilet Repair & Installation in Arkansas

Looking for toilet repair & installation in Arkansas? Contact Plumbing Local Pros at (877) 710-2942 for professional plumbing services. Running toilet, clogged toilet, or need a new toilet installed? Our expert plumbers handle all toilet repairs and installations fast, efficiently, and affordably near you.

Get Quotes

Faucet Repair & Installation in Arkansas

Looking for faucet repair & installation in Arkansas? Contact Plumbing Local Pros at (877) 710-2942 for professional plumbing services. Dripping faucet wasting water and money? We repair and install all types of kitchen and bathroom faucets including single-handle, double-handle, and touchless models.

Get Quotes

Sewer Line Repair & Replacement in Arkansas

Looking for sewer line repair & replacement in Arkansas? Contact Plumbing Local Pros at (877) 710-2942 for professional plumbing services. Sewer line problems can be serious and costly.

Get Quotes

Garbage Disposal Repair & Installation in Arkansas

Looking for garbage disposal repair & installation in Arkansas? Contact Plumbing Local Pros at (877) 710-2942 for professional plumbing services. Garbage disposal broken, jammed, or leaking? We repair and install all brands of garbage disposal units quickly and cleanly so your kitchen is back to normal fast.

Get Quotes

Leak Detection & Repair in Arkansas

Looking for leak detection & repair in Arkansas? Contact Plumbing Local Pros at (877) 710-2942 for professional plumbing services. Hidden leaks behind walls and under floors can cause massive damage.

Get Quotes

Bathroom Plumbing Services in Arkansas

Looking for bathroom plumbing services in Arkansas? Contact Plumbing Local Pros at (877) 710-2942 for professional plumbing services. Full bathroom plumbing services including shower installation, bathtub drain repair, toilet installation, sink faucet replacement, and complete bathroom remodel plumbing near you.

Get Quotes

Kitchen Plumbing Services in Arkansas

Looking for kitchen plumbing services in Arkansas? Contact Plumbing Local Pros at (877) 710-2942 for professional plumbing services. Expert kitchen plumbing including kitchen sink installation, dishwasher hookup, garbage disposal installation, and under-sink pipe repair — fast and affordable near you.

Get Quotes

Water Filtration & Softener in Arkansas

Looking for water filtration & softener in Arkansas? Contact Plumbing Local Pros at (877) 710-2942 for professional plumbing services. Improve your home's water quality with professional water filtration and softener installation.

Get Quotes

Sump Pump Installation & Repair in Arkansas

Looking for sump pump installation & repair in Arkansas? Contact Plumbing Local Pros at (877) 710-2942 for professional plumbing services. Protect your basement from flooding with a properly installed sump pump.

Get Quotes

Gas Line Services in Arkansas

Looking for gas line services in Arkansas? Contact Plumbing Local Pros at (877) 710-2942 for professional plumbing services. Licensed gas line installation, repair, and leak detection for your home or business.

Get Quotes

Whole-House Repiping in Arkansas

Looking for whole-house repiping in Arkansas? Contact Plumbing Local Pros at (877) 710-2942 for professional plumbing services. Old galvanized or corroded pipes affecting water pressure and quality? We provide complete whole-house repiping with modern copper or PEX pipe for a long-lasting solution near you.

Get Quotes

Hydro Jetting Services in Arkansas

Looking for hydro jetting services in Arkansas? Contact Plumbing Local Pros at (877) 710-2942 for professional plumbing services. Powerful hydro-jetting blasts away grease, scale, tree roots, and debris from your drain and sewer lines.

Get Quotes

Commercial Plumbing Services in Arkansas

Looking for commercial plumbing services in Arkansas? Contact Plumbing Local Pros at (877) 710-2942 for professional plumbing services. Reliable commercial plumbing for offices, restaurants, retail spaces, and multi-unit buildings.

Get Quotes

Backflow Prevention & Testing in Arkansas

Looking for backflow prevention & testing in Arkansas? Contact Plumbing Local Pros at (877) 710-2942 for professional plumbing services. Protect your water supply from contamination with certified backflow preventer installation and annual testing.

Get Quotes
Why Choose Us

Best Local Plumbers in Arkansas

Plumbing Local Pros is deeply committed to keeping the water flowing safely in Arkansas. We offer eco-friendly plumbing solutions, high-efficiency water heater upgrades, and water-saving fixture installations.

Our commitment to excellence extends beyond the repair itself. We ensure our work area is left spotless, hauling away old parts and debris so you can get back to enjoying your home immediately.

Arkansas homeowners and businesses can rely on our licensed local plumbers for all plumbing needs — from emergency repairs to routine maintenance.

(877) 710-2942

Frequently Asked Questions About Plumbers in Arkansas

Tankless water heaters heat water on demand rather than storing it in a tank, providing endless hot water and up to 30% energy savings. They're a great investment for Arkansas homes with multiple bathrooms or high hot water demands.

Polybutylene pipes are notoriously defective and prone to sudden bursting. We strongly recommend completely repiping homes with polybutylene. Contact Plumbing Local Pros for a repiping consultation in Arkansas.

Yes! We offer same-day drain cleaning and clog removal services in Arkansas. Whether it's a kitchen sink, bathroom drain, or main sewer line, our plumbers arrive fast with professional equipment. Call (877) 710-2942 today.

Food particles can rot inside the unit. Try grinding ice cubes and lemon peels, or flush it with baking soda and vinegar. If it persists or drains slowly, call Plumbing Local Pros for professional garbage disposal repair in Arkansas.

Traditional tank water heaters last about 8-12 years, while tankless models can last up to 20 years with proper maintenance. If your unit in Arkansas is over 10 years old and having issues, replacement is often the most cost-effective option.

Testimonials

What Our Clients Say About Us in Arkansas

★★★★★

"I highly recommend Plumbing Local Pros. The dispatcher was friendly, the plumber arrived in Arkansas when promised, wore shoe covers, fixed my leaky shower valve, and charged exactly what was quoted."

Charles Y.
Arkansas
★★★★★

"Our kitchen sink backed up completely right before Thanksgiving! I called Plumbing Local Pros in a panic. They had a tech at my Arkansas house within 2 hours who snaked the line and saved the holiday."

Patricia O.
Arkansas
★★★★★

"Plumbing Local Pros installed a whole-house water filtration system in our Arkansas home. The difference in water quality is incredible. The installation was clean and professional. Highly recommend!"

Rachel G.
Arkansas

Our licensed local plumbers are standing by for same day service across all of Arkansas.

Plumbing Local Pros

Professional local plumbing services across the United States. Available same day and 24/7 for emergencies — drain cleaning, water heater repair, pipe repair, toilet & faucet installation, sewer line services and more.
